title: cleistanthus polystachyus subsp. polystachyus
intro: Cleistanthus polystachyus subsp. polystachyus is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a medicinal herb. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cleistanthus polystachyus subsp. polystachyus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Cleistanthus polystachyus subsp. polystachyus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal use.
